species.citation: (Jonker) Hroneš , Phytotaxa 172 (2014) 55; ≡ Scaphiophora gigantea Jonker , Monogr. Burmann. (1938) 257 ; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1948) 26; Type: A. Loher s.n. (M, holo), Luzon: Laguna, Mt Makiling.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Laguna.
